claim_card.claim: The practical value of intuition lies in operational advantage: earlier detection of instability, lower interpretive cost, improved alertness, faster reaction, and better continuity under changing conditions.
claim_card.test_hook: Benchmark intuition-scaffolded systems against standard systems on lead time, continuity preservation, probe efficiency, and degradation under unstable contexts.

source.locator: p3 Section II; p4 Section III; p7 Thesis 3
